title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners:
Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners!
